title: Our Projects
description: Explore our portfolio of successful digital solutions — from automotive to healthcare and beyond.

projects.title: AutoParts Inventory System
projects.description: A comprehensive inventory management system for automotive parts with real-time stock tracking.
projects.detail: This project involved building a full-featured inventory management system for an automotive parts distributor. The system tracks over 10,000 SKUs across multiple warehouses, provides real-time stock levels, automated reorder points, and detailed analytics dashboards. Built with React and Node.js, the system handles thousands of transactions daily.

projects.title: BuildPro Construction Platform
projects.description: Project management and resource allocation platform for construction companies.
projects.detail: A digital platform for construction project management including resource scheduling, budget tracking, subcontractor management, and compliance documentation. The system serves over 200 active construction sites with real-time progress reporting and mobile access for field workers.

projects.title: MediTrack Healthcare System
projects.description: Electronic health records and patient management system for clinics.
projects.detail: A secure, HIPAA-compliant electronic health records system featuring patient intake, appointment scheduling, prescription management, and telehealth integration. The system processes over 50,000 patient records and supports multiple clinic locations.

projects.title: WarehousePro Inventory
projects.description: Multi-warehouse inventory optimization system with barcode scanning.
projects.detail: An enterprise-grade inventory management solution with barcode/QR code scanning, batch tracking, expiry date management, and integrations with major ERP systems. The system handles real-time inventory across 15 warehouses with sub-2-second sync times.

projects.title: ProcureFlow Platform
projects.description: End-to-end procurement automation platform for enterprise purchasing.
projects.detail: A comprehensive procurement platform covering purchase requisitions, approval workflows, vendor management, PO generation, and invoice matching. The system reduced procurement cycle time by 60% for the client and processes over $50M in annual purchases.

projects.title: FactorySense Industrial IoT
projects.description: IoT monitoring system for industrial equipment and production lines.
projects.detail: An Industrial IoT solution that monitors equipment health, production metrics, energy consumption, and predictive maintenance alerts. The system connects to over 500 sensors across the factory floor and provides real-time dashboards and automated alerting.

projects.title: TourConnect Booking System
projects.description: Online booking and tour management platform for travel agencies.
projects.detail: A full-featured tourism booking platform with package management, real-time availability, online payments, itinerary builder, and customer portal. The system handles bookings for 50+ tour packages and integrates with multiple payment gateways.
